overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along an elevated glass walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves steadily forward over a multi-lane intersection with flying vehicle traffic below, surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway above commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the glass elevated walkway, looking down at the street below

notable_agents.action: flying car moving along the street below the walkway

entered.detail: transparent glass floor and railings of the elevated pedestrian bridge
tall palm tree visible alongside the left building facade
tall building with green neon signage and illuminated windows
large building facade covered with glowing digital advertisements and screens

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a glass elevated walkway in a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. To the left, a palm tree stands beside a building with green neon accents, while the right side features a massive wall of digital billboards. Flying cars move along the street visible through the transparent walkway floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway crossing over major intersection

events.description: walkway opens up to reveal the wide intersection below with golden grid pattern markings
multiple flying vehicles pass beneath and around the walkway at intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing over the wide intersection while observing the flying traffic below

notable_agents.action: red flying car ascending through the intersection below the walkway

entered.detail: golden yellow grid pattern marking the street intersection visible through the glass floor
elevated pedestrian bridge structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens up to cross a major intersection, revealing a dramatic view of the golden grid-patterned streets below. Flying vehicles navigate the intersection beneath the transparent walkway, while an overhead pedestrian bridge structure becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: passing under the first overhead pedestrian bridge structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway as it passes under overhead structures

entered.detail: glass and metal pedestrian bridge spanning overhead with glowing edges
cluster of buildings with purple and green neon lighting on facades

segments.scene_description: Moving past the intersection, the walkway enters a more enclosed section as it passes under overhead pedestrian bridges. The digital billboards on the right draw closer, while neon-lit building complexes line the left side, creating a canyon-like urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban canyon with multiple walkway levels

events.description: entering deeply enclosed urban canyon with overhead structures blocking sky view

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed neon canyon, surrounded by towering structures on all sides

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle navigating through the narrow urban canyon ahead

entered.detail: narrow passage between tall buildings with multiple levels of walkways and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a deeply enclosed urban canyon where overhead walkways and structures block most of the sky. The environment becomes more claustrophobic with neon-lit walls on both sides, while flying vehicles navigate the narrow airspace ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated glass walkway that transitions from an open neon cityscape into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins beside a palm tree and green-accented buildings, gliding over a transparent floor where flying cars stream beneath a wall of digital billboards. As the walkway opens up to cross a major intersection, the view expands to reveal a golden grid-patterned street below before the camera approaches a distant overhead pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as it passes under these bridges, with the digital billboards and neon complexes drawing closer to create a canyon-like effect. Finally, the path enters a deeply constricted urban corridor where overhead structures block the sky and neon-lit walls press in from both sides.
